problem id: 75ecd32c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  01111011 -> 11011110
  11011000 -> 00110110
  00011110 -> 10000111
  00000100 -> 00000001
  10011001 -> 01100110
  01100110 -> 10011001
  11011011 -> 11110110
  11101001 -> 01111010
  11111111 -> 11111111
  11110101 -> 01111101

query: 10001111
predicted answer: 11100011
